title: Netflix used AI in 300 shows. Its biggest director calls AI a Trojan horse.
summary: Asked by interviewer Hugo Travers whether AI might be a modern Trojan horse, Nolan laughed. “I think AI is a Trojan horse that everybody knows the Greeks are inside,” he said, in remarks reported by TechCrunch .
caption: output/2026-07-20/netflix-used-ai-in-300-shows-its-biggest-director-calls-ai-a-trojan-ho.txt
